name: Pavan v. Smith
question: Is it unconstitutional for a state to preclude a same-sex couple from being listed as the two parents on their child's birth certificate?
description: A case in which the Court decided the constitutionality of an Arkansas statute that by its language precludes both names of a same-sex married couple from being listed as parents on a child's birth certificate, in light of the Court's decision in Obergefell v. Hodges.
